subject: WM-0086 ready for review
body: Added Web product-gate harness with 192x192 deterministic M5/M4-derived fixture, build-time release-gate report, recorded Chrome/Edge and COI/SAB assumptions, and read-only HUD/debug evidence; required checks passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, pnpm quality.
